Variant 1: Split with Gradient Edge
👤 About

Leadership That Builds,
Not Just Advises

I didn't just study AI from the sidelines — I built it at scale inside two of the world's most important technology companies.

As CTO at Microsoft and Intel, I led teams that shipped products used by billions. Today, I help founders and boards navigate AI with the wisdom that only comes from doing.

20+ Years in Tech
2x Fortune 500 CTO
Top 50 Black Business Women
Variant 2: Floating Card with Glow
LAKECIA

Meet Lakecia

Former CTO, Microsoft & Intel

I built AI at scale inside two of the world's most important technology companies. As CTO at Microsoft and Intel, I led teams that shipped products used by billions.

Today, I help founders and boards navigate AI with the wisdom that only comes from doing — not studying from the sidelines.

Leadership That Builds

I didn't just study AI from the sidelines — I built it at scale inside Microsoft and Intel, leading teams that shipped products used by billions.
